matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: The Brazilian Forest Service LPF page explicitly identifies the tentative record Peltogyne cf. subsessilis and captions this image Corte tangencial.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Opened at original resolution. The image is entirely an exposed reddish-purple longitudinal wood surface with subtle natural grain; there is no tree, leaf, bark exterior, finished product, generic texture, diagram, or microscopy.
matchedCandidate.creator: Serviço Florestal Brasileiro, Laboratório de Produtos Florestais (LPF/SFB)
